TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_O_sowal_no_dipon, title = O_sowal_no_dipon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/O_sowal_no_dipon} }

S.FORM: Itiya 2002 a mihecaan, misatapangkoTaypak Sisifo yincomincosewuiingkay, Oco-wey ci KonWen Ci ko misalaheciaya patireng to sowal no dipong. Tangasa imatini, tolo polo' ira ko tosa ko polong no picodadan ato pasifana'ay to sowal no kasasiromaromaa finacadan i tokay. Hatinikaadihay ko sowal no dipong. O no Pangcah i, ira kono 'Amis, o Siwkulang, o Pasawaliay, Falangaw ato Palidaw a sowal.
S.PHON: itija **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, misatapaŇčko~utajpak sisifo~u jin ¶o~umin ¶o~us…ôwo~u~uiiŇčkaj, o~u ¶o~u-w…ôj ¶i ko~unw…ôn ¶i ko~u misa…ĺańß…ô ¶iaja patir…ôŇč to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. taŇčasa imatini, to~u…ĺo~u po~u…ĺo~u ° ira ko~u to~usa ko~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan ato~u pasifana °aj to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u kasasiro~umaro~umaa fina ¶a…¨~…ģan i to~ukaj. ńßatinikaa…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. o~u no~u paŇč ¶ańß i, ira ko~uno~u °amis, o~u siwko~u~u…ĺaŇč, o~u pasawa…ĺiaj, fa…ĺaŇčaw ato~u pa…ĺi…¨~…ģaw a so~uwa…ĺ.
S.FORM: Itiya 2002 a mihecaan, misatapangkoTaypak Sisifo yincomincosewuiingkay, Oco-wey ci KonWen Ci ko misalaheciaya patireng to sowal no dipong. Tangasa imatini, tolo polo' ira ko tosa ko polong no picodadan ato pasifana'ay to sowal no kasasiromaromaa finacadan i tokay. Hatinikaadihay ko sowal no dipong. O no Pangcah i, ira kono 'Amis, o Siwkulang, o Pasawaliay, Falangaw ato Palidaw a sowal.
